reviews.comment:
Mala atención del personal, no te dejan ni tomar mate en el local y ni hablar si querés consumir algo tuyo.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service from the staff, they don't even let you drink mate in the place, let alone if you want to buy something of your own.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyLU9yd3hBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala atencion en el servicompras. Los empleados charlaban entre ellos y yo esperando. Muy pendientes de su celular La cajera cero amabilidad. Las confituras excentes, muy frescas. El café extremadamente fuerte.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service at the convenience store. The employees were chatting amongst themselves while I waited. They were constantly on their phones. The cashier was incredibly unfriendly. The sweets were excellent, very fresh. The coffee was extremely strong.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyaVBIa3pRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La mayoría de las veces están muy limpios los baños. Agua para el mate gratuita.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are usually very clean. Free hot water for mate.
